instruction: This weekend you will meet with an old classmate who has just returned from abroad. You have taken out the first menu from Annie Italian Restaurant and the second menu from Butcher Restaurant (this restaurant currently only offers dishes within the reddish-brown frame). He mentioned that he has been craving delicious seafood recently, so you need to ask the AI Service Agent to choose one of these two restaurants based on this preference. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it. You are a diner who focuses on high fiber intake (User ID: customer_009). In the video, you pointed at three dishes. Ask the AI Service Agent to check the flavor profile of the top dish in the category where the second pointed dish is located. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if it is a slightly salty and mild flavor, then ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category within the white rounded box at the top left of the menu fold, find dishes that are [High Fiber] and [Highest Price], and add two portions to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want two portions of each to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to filter out an item that is [Dairy-free] and [Lowest Calorie] in the section on the left border of the right fold with a small hand illustration, and add one portion to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest calorie among those that meet the conditions, you want one portion of each to be added. After selection, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the current order total price is greater than 250 yuan, then ask the AI Service Agent to subtract one portion of the highest priced dish in the order (including sets). Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to verify the final total tax amount.

source_clause: annie_butcher_1.mp4 / menu_1: menu category containing the second pointed dish

instruction: You and your best friend are planning a late-night snack while binge-watching a show. You are a student dining with a friend (User ID: customer_004). You looked at the menu and pointed at three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the last pointed dish belongs to the high-sugar category, then ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category immediately above the dark background section on the right fold for dishes that are [high protein] and have the [lowest price], and add them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category at the very bottom of the middle fold that has a small hand illustration next to the title, for a dish that is [spicy flavor] and has the [highest calorie count], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest calorie count among those that meet the conditions, add all of them. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total cost of non-set meal items in the order exceeds 80 yuan, then ask the AI Service Agent to remove the non-set meal item with the highest tax rate from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the final total amount payable after applying discounts.

instruction: You are hosting a small family gathering and want to order some delicious food. You have menus from two restaurants you've enjoyed before: Mediterranean Greek Restaurant and Annie Italian Restaurant. Your family likes meat but wants to avoid seafood. Please ask the AI Service Agent to consult with the AI service assistant on which restaurant is the better choice. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it. You are the parent ordering for the family (User ID: customer_010). You pointed at three dishes in the video. Ask the AI Service Agent to check whether the last dish in the category of the first pointed-at dish is sweet. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if it is sweet, then ask the AI Service Agent to look in the section on the middle fold of the menu where there is a small hand icon to the left of the title, find a dish that is [High Protein] and has the [Largest Discount], and add two portions of it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the largest discount, add two portions of each of those tied dishes. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category on the right fold where there is a small hand illustration on the left border, find a dish that is [Slightly Salty Flavor] and has the [Highest Unit Price], and add one portion of it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price, add one portion of each of those tied dishes. After placing the order, you suddenly remember that your child is allergic to nuts, so ask the AI Service Agent to check the order. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the order contains non-set dishes containing nuts, then ask the AI Service Agent to immediately replace them with the Seafood Delight Set. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to summarize the total carbohydrates of the final order.

instruction: This is a family gathering, and you want everyone to enjoy a relaxed and stress-free meal through takeout. If there are multiple items tied for the biggest discount among those that meet the conditions, add one of each. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to filter for dishes that are [Dairy-Free] and have the [Lowest Price] in the category at the top of the middle fold of the menu, and add two portions of them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add two portions of each. Ask the AI service agent to determine if the total cost of non-set meal items in the order exceeds 150 yuan. You have checked the menu of Pau Hana Bar (top half green, bottom half white) and the menu of Annie Italian Restaurant (white background, green border). You need the AI service agent to first select a restaurant based on your brother's preferences. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it.
Ask the AI Service Agent to determine whether the most expensive dish in the category located on the middle fold with a small hand illustration on the left side of the title has a spicy tag. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish that is [dairy-free] and [lowest priced] in the white rounded box section at the top of the left fold and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, add one of each. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find an item in the category directly above the category with the lively small hand illustration that is [high calcium] and [highest tax rate included], and add two portions of it. If there are multiple items tied for the highest tax rate among those that meet the conditions, add two portions of each.

After selection, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the total number of dishes in the current order is greater than or equal to 3. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to remove the non-set dish with the highest calories from the order. If there are multiple non-set dishes tied for the highest calories, remove all of them. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount of money saved for you due to discounts on this order.

instruction: Tonight you are hosting a foreign client who likes salmon. You have checked the menu of Pau Hana Bar (green on top, white on bottom) and the menu of Annie Italian Restaurant (white background, green border). Ask the AI Service Agent to select the more suitable restaurant from these two based on the client's preferences. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it. You are a budget-conscious college student (User ID: customer_001). Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the dish with the lowest unit price in the bottom-left section of the menu layout (which resembles a tic-tac-toe grid) is on sale. If it is, ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category with a small hand illustration on the left side of the title for a dish that is [Low Fat] and has the [Highest Tax Rate] to add to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest tax rate, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to look in the category directly below the section with a small hand illustration in the right-hand fold for a dish that is [Gluten-Free] and has the [Lowest Unit Price] to add to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest unit price, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the current total order price is below 110 yuan. If it is, ask the AI Service Agent to replace the cheapest dish in the order with the dish having the highest protein on the entire menu. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest protein, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total fat value for the order.

instruction: Your mother is coming over tomorrow noon, and she has been craving beef recently. You are currently viewing the menus of two restaurants: Annie Italian Restaurant and Pau Hana Bar. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to look in the section with a small hand illustration located to the left of the title on the middle fold, find a [Nut-Free] single item with the [highest calories], and add one portion to the order. Afterwards, ask the AI Service Agent to judge: if the order contains any dishes containing dairy products, ask the AI Service Agent to remove them all (including set meals). Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax for the dishes you ordered.

instruction: You are hosting a small family party and want to order delicious food. You have menus from two restaurants you have visited and liked before: Mediterranean Greek Restaurant and Annie Italian Restaurant. Your family likes meat but wants to avoid seafood. Please have the AI Service Agent determine which restaurant is the better choice. Once the restaurant is selected, inform the AI service agent that all subsequent tasks will be based on this chosen restaurant, and you won’t need to reiterate it. You are customer_009. You are a diabetic patient who needs to strictly control free sugar intake. Have the AI Service Agent check the first pointed dish. If it has no discount (i.e., discount factor is 1.0), have the AI Service Agent look for items with the [High Calcium] feature in the category located exactly in the middle of the left fold, and add the one with the lowest sugar content to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sugar content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, have the AI Service Agent look for dishes with a [Fresh/Slightly Sour] taste in the section directly above the dark background category on the right fold, and add the most expensive one to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, have the AI Service Agent add one portion of the "Seafood Delight Set" to the order. Have the AI Service Agent check if the total sugar content of the order exceeds 30 grams (calculated per dish based on a 100g unit). If it does, have the AI Service Agent remove the item with the highest sugar content (including the set meal). Finally, have the AI Service Agent calculate the total taxes and fees included in the entire order.
